headline: Intern Accidentally Emails 'I Quit' Draft Instead of Timesheet, Decides To Commit
summary: The subject line read 'DRAFT DO NOT SEND' but it was, tragically, sent.
fullBody: Kevin McOops drafted a dramatic resignation email during a moment of workplace frustration. 'I never meant to send it,' McOops explained. 'But then HR replied 'we accept.' So I had to follow through.' He now works at a coffee shop where his only email responsibility is 'none, because I learned my lesson.' The original email has been framed in the office break room as a warning to future interns.
